title: Brazilian Gooey Salad Bites
description: A delightful twist on traditional salad bites, these Brazilian gooey bites are sure to impress. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine mulukhiyah leaves, salad mix, and sour cream.
Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
Spoon the mixture into small muffin tin cups.
Crumble the Brazilian cheese over the top of each cup.
Sprinkle crushed crackers over the cheese.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
